title: Figma to Code: Homepage Production Migration

tasks.title: Rename CSS tokens in global.css (brand prefix)
tasks.description: Rename the 6 brand-prefixed tokens in `apps/web2/src/styles/global.css`: `--primary` → `--brand-primary`, `--secondary` → `--brand-secondary`, `--tertiary` → `--brand-tertiary`, `--accent` → `--brand-accent`, `--secondary-foreground` → `--brand-secondary-foreground`, `--feature-strip` → `--brand-feature-strip`. Only modify the token definitions in the `:root` block. Do NOT update references yet (that is T-002). Run a grep to verify all 6 old names are removed from token definitions. Tests: verify file compiles without errors; snapshot the `:root` block to detect regressions.

subtasks.title: Verify no duplicate token names remain

tasks.title: Rename CSS tokens in global.css (core prefix)
tasks.description: Rename the 4 core-prefixed tokens in `apps/web2/src/styles/global.css`: `--foreground` → `--core-foreground`, `--background` → `--core-background`, `--card` → `--core-card`, `--muted-foreground` → `--core-muted-foreground`. Only modify the token definitions in the `:root` block. Search for any `var(--foreground)` etc. patterns in the same file and update them if they appear within global.css itself. Tests: verify global.css compiles; grep confirms old unprefixed names are gone from `:root`.

subtasks.title: Verify no duplicate token names remain

tasks.title: Update all CSS token references across web2 codebase
tasks.description: After T-001 and T-002 rename token definitions, update ALL `var(--primary)`, `var(--secondary)`, `var(--tertiary)`, `var(--accent)`, `var(--secondary-foreground)`, `var(--feature-strip)`, `var(--foreground)`, `var(--background)`, `var(--card)`, `var(--muted-foreground)` references across all files in `apps/web2/src/` (`.astro`, `.tsx`, `.ts`, `.css`). Use search-and-replace carefully: `var(--primary)` → `var(--brand-primary)` etc. After replacement, run a grep to confirm zero remaining references to old token names. Tests: run typecheck; build must not error; snapshot tests on affected components detect regressions.

subtasks.title: Search-replace brand token refs in .astro files
Search-replace brand token refs in .tsx/.ts files
Search-replace brand token refs in .css files
Grep verify zero old token references remain

tasks.title: Upgrade embla-carousel-react and embla-carousel-autoplay to ^8.6.0
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/package.json`, update `embla-carousel-react` and `embla-carousel-autoplay` from `^8.5.1` to `^8.6.0`. Run `pnpm install` to update the lockfile. Verify no breaking changes in the v8.5→v8.6 changelog. Check that existing carousel usages in `apps/web2/src/` still compile (`pnpm typecheck`). Tests: run existing carousel component tests to confirm they pass after upgrade.

subtasks.title: Run pnpm install to update lockfile
Run pnpm typecheck to verify compilation

tasks.title: Create API client types.ts and client.ts
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/lib/api/types.ts` with: `ApiResult<T>` (discriminated union `{ ok: true; data: T } | { ok: false; error: ApiError }`), `ApiError` interface, `PaginationMeta` interface, `PaginatedResponse<T>` interface. Then create `apps/web2/src/lib/api/client.ts`: typed fetch wrapper function `apiFetch<T>(path, options?)` returning `Promise<ApiResult<T>>`. Base URL from `import.meta.env.PUBLIC_API_URL`. 10s timeout via `AbortController`. On non-OK response or timeout, return `{ ok: false, error }`. Model after `apps/web/src/lib/api/client.ts`. Tests: unit tests for `apiFetch` mocking `fetch` — test success path, 4xx path, 5xx path, timeout path.

subtasks.title: Create types.ts with ApiResult, ApiError, PaginationMeta, PaginatedResponse
Write unit tests for 4 fetch scenarios

tasks.title: Create API client endpoints.ts
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/lib/api/endpoints.ts`. Implement typed endpoint methods using `apiFetch` from T-009: `accommodationsApi.list({ isFeatured?, pageSize? })` → `GET /api/v1/public/accommodations`, `destinationsApi.list({ isFeatured?, pageSize? })` → `GET /api/v1/public/destinations`, `eventsApi.listUpcoming({ pageSize?, daysAhead? })` → `GET /api/v1/public/events/upcoming`, `postsApi.list({ sortBy?, sortOrder?, pageSize? })` → `GET /api/v1/public/posts`. Each method builds query params from options. Return types use `PaginatedResponse<T>` wrapped in `ApiResult`. Tests: unit test each endpoint method mocking `apiFetch` — test that query params are constructed correctly.

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for query param construction

tasks.title: Create API client transforms.ts
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/lib/api/transforms.ts`. Implement 4 transform functions that convert raw API response items to component prop shapes: `toAccommodationCardProps(item)`, `toDestinationCardProps(item)`, `toEventCardProps(item)`, `toPostCardProps(item)`. Each transform maps API field names to the prop names expected by card components (cross-reference `src/data/types.ts`). Handle optional fields with fallbacks. Create a barrel `apps/web2/src/lib/api/index.ts` re-exporting all 4 files. Tests: unit test each transform with a realistic fixture — verify output shape matches expected props interface.

subtasks.title: Write transform unit tests with fixtures

tasks.title: Rename SPEC-048 section components per mapping table
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/sections/`, rename files per the mapping table: `AccommodationsSection.astro` → `FeaturedAccommodationsSection.astro`, `AboutSection.astro` → `AboutUsSection.astro`, `EventsSection.astro` → `NextEventsSection.astro`, `PostsSection.astro` → `LatestArticlesSection.astro`, `ReviewsSection.astro` → `TestimonialsSection.astro`, `BestFeaturesBanner.astro` → `CtaOwnersSection.astro`. Update all import statements in `src/pages/[lang]/index.astro` and any other consumers. Delete `FeaturesCtaSection.astro` if it exists as a duplicate. Tests: pnpm typecheck must pass; grep confirms no orphaned imports to old filenames.

tasks.title: Rename SPEC-048 React island files per mapping table
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/islands/` (or wherever they live), rename: `DestinationCarousel.client.tsx` → `DestinationsCarousel.client.tsx` (and `.module.css`), `ReviewCarousel.client.tsx` → `TestimonialsCarousel.client.tsx` (and `.module.css`), `StatCounter.client.tsx` → `AnimatedCounter.client.tsx` (and `.module.css`). Convert `DestinationCard.tsx` (React) → `DestinationCard.astro` if it has no client-side state. Delete `PostCarousel.client.tsx` and its CSS module. Delete `PostCard.module.css` and `ReviewCard.module.css`. Update all import statements. Tests: typecheck passes; no orphaned imports.

tasks.title: Update src/data/types.ts with complete card prop types
tasks.description: Review and update `apps/web2/src/data/types.ts`. Verify existing types (`AccommodationCardData`, `DestinationCardData`, `EventCardData`, `BlogPostCardData`, `ReviewCardData`) match actual API response shapes. Add missing fields: `AccommodationCardData` needs `amenities`, `isFeatured`, `type`, `rating`, `reviewCount`; `ReviewCardData` needs `avatarUrl`, `initials`, `entityName`, `entitySlug`, `entityType`. Add `ArticleCardBaseProps` interface with common fields shared by all 3 article card variants. Ensure all types are exported. Tests: unit test type compatibility by creating fixture objects that satisfy each interface.

subtasks.title: Audit existing types vs API schema
Add missing fields to existing types

tasks.title: Implement Header.astro sticky scroll-transparency behavior
tasks.description: Update `apps/web2/src/components/layout/Header.astro`. Add a sentinel `<div id='scroll-sentinel'>` as the first child of `<body>`. In an inline `<script>`, set up `IntersectionObserver` on the sentinel: when sentinel exits viewport, add class `scrolled` to the header; when it enters, remove it. In `<style>`, define `.scrolled` class: `background: oklch(from var(--core-card) l c h / 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 oklch(...)`. At scroll 0, header background is transparent. Header must have `position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: var(--z-nav); max-height: 80px`. Tests: render test verifying sentinel div exists; script behavior test using IntersectionObserver mock.

subtasks.title: Add sentinel div to Header.astro markup
Write render tests for sentinel and sticky styles

tasks.title: Implement Header.astro responsive layout (desktop/tablet/mobile)
tasks.description: Update `apps/web2/src/components/layout/Header.astro`. Add 3-tier layout: Desktop (>=1024px): Logo + nav links + username/avatar + search icon. Tablet (768-1023px): Logo + nav links + search icon (avatar hidden). Mobile (<768px): Logo + hamburger button + search icon (nav links hidden). Use CSS classes with Tailwind breakpoints or media queries referencing CSS tokens. Each nav link: `<a href={buildUrl(locale, path)} aria-current={isCurrentPage ? 'page' : undefined}`. Search icon links to `/{locale}/busqueda/`. Skip navigation link as first focusable element (`<a class='skip-link' href='#main-content'>`). Tests: snapshot test for each breakpoint class structure.

tasks.title: Implement Header.astro smooth-scroll for homepage anchors
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/layout/Header.astro`, add logic so that nav links pointing to section anchors (#featured-accommodations, #destinations, #events, #blog, #contact) trigger smooth scroll when on the homepage, and navigate to their full-page URL when on any other page. Detect current page via `Astro.url.pathname`. If on homepage, use `href='#section-id'` and add CSS `html { scroll-behavior: smooth }` or JS `scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })`. If on other pages, use `href='/{locale}/alojamientos/'` etc. Tests: unit test the URL generation logic for homepage vs other pages.

subtasks.title: Add scroll-behavior: smooth to global CSS
Test URL generation for homepage vs other pages

tasks.title: Implement HeroSection.astro two-column layout and text stack
tasks.description:
Update `apps/web2/src/components/sections/HeroSection.astro`. Build the two-column layout: left 60% (text stack + search bar placeholder) / right 40% (blob image). Min-height `calc(100vh - 80px)`. Left column: tagline (`

` with Caveat Bold 64px, `--brand-primary`, text from `t('home.hero.tagline')`), title (`

` Geologica Bold 96px, `--core-foreground`, staggered word animation via CSS + data-word index), description (Roboto 18px, `--core-muted-foreground`). Secondary CTA button below search bar area. Social proof row (3 avatar images + stars + text). All strings via `t()`. Tests: render test verifying tagline, title, description present; a11y test on heading hierarchy.

subtasks.title: Add tagline with Caveat font class
Add h1 title with word-span markup for animation

tasks.title: Implement HeroSection.astro blob image with crossfade and parallax
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/sections/HeroSection.astro`, implement the right-column blob image: (1) SVG blob mask applied via `clip-path` or `mask-image` using the Figma blob SVG path. (2) Three `<Image>` elements stacked with `position: absolute`, animated with CSS `@keyframes` to crossfade on a 5s cycle (each image shows 4.5s, fades 0.5s overlap). (3) Blob parallax: inline `<script>` with `IntersectionObserver` + `requestAnimationFrame` to apply `transform: translateY()` capped at 30px based on scroll position. (4) Decorative floating icons around blob: CSS `@keyframes` with random `translateX/Y` 5-10px, 3-6s duration per icon. All animations must check `window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)')` and skip motion if active. LCP image uses `fetchpriority='high'`. Tests: render test for 3 image elements; test that `@keyframes` are disabled when reduced-motion.

subtasks.title: Apply blob SVG mask to image container

tasks.title: Implement HeroSection.astro staggered title animation
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/sections/HeroSection.astro`, implement the staggered title animation: wrap each word of `t('home.hero.title')` in a `<span data-word='N'>` element. CSS `@keyframes fadeInUp` animates opacity 0→1 and translateY 20px→0. Each span has `animation-delay: calc(N * 150ms)`. On page load, the animation plays once. Check `window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)')` — if true, remove animation classes and show words immediately. Optionally use `astro:page-load` event for view transition compatibility. Tests: unit test that word-wrapping produces correct number of spans; test reduced-motion branch shows final state.

subtasks.title: Wrap title words in indexed spans
Define fadeInUp keyframe with staggered delays

tasks.title: Implement HeroSection.astro hero mobile layout
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/sections/HeroSection.astro`, add mobile responsive styles: below 768px, hero stacks vertically (text column full-width on top, blob image below or hidden on <640px). Title font-size reduces to 64px at md breakpoint. Blob decorative shapes hidden on mobile (`display: none`). Social proof row compresses. Secondary CTA button becomes full-width. Use CSS media queries referencing `--space-*` tokens. Tests: snapshot test at 375px viewport confirms stacked layout; verify shape elements have `display: none` CSS in mobile query.

subtasks.title: Add mobile media queries for stacked layout
Reduce title font-size at md breakpoint

Left: CSS Grid photo collage with 3-4 images using `grid-row`/`grid-column` spans for overlapping effect; `object-fit: cover` on each; no absolute positioning; decorative accent shape behind with `aria-hidden='true'`. Right: accent tagline + `<h2>` title (Geologica Bold 48px) + body paragraphs (Roboto 16px, `--core-muted-foreground`) + secondary CTA linking to `/nosotros/`. All strings via `t('home.about.*')`. Images use Astro `<Image>`. Tests: render test verifying grid structure; a11y test for heading hierarchy; verify decorative images have `aria-hidden`.

Each illustration gets slightly different `animation-duration` and `animation-delay` for organic feel. Check `prefers-reduced-motion` in a `

CSS `@keyframes float-cta-image` with `translateX/Y` ~5-8px range, 4-5s duration, `infinite alternate ease-in-out`. Check `prefers-reduced-motion` and disable animation if active. Each stat card: icon from `@repo/icons` (BuildingIcon, LocationIcon, StarIcon, CompassIcon, UsersIcon) with `aria-hidden='true'`, numeric value slot (renders static value for now — AnimatedCounter island wired in T-038), label (Roboto 16px, `--core-muted-foreground`). tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/sections/StatsSection.astro`, add responsive styles for mobile: below 1024px, stats use `grid-cols-2` layout (2x2 grid). The 5th card uses `grid-column: 1 / -1; justify-self: center` to center it below the 2x2 grid on a 3rd row. Between 1024px and above: 5-column. Use CSS media queries with `min-width`. Tests: snapshot test at 375px viewport confirming 2x2+1 structure; snapshot at 1440px confirming 5-column.

tasks.title: Implement Footer.astro 4-column grid and navigation
tasks.description: Implement `apps/web2/src/components/layout/Footer.astro`. Background `--footer-bg`. 4-column CSS Grid: Col 1: Logo + description + social icons (`SocialLinks.astro`). Col 2: 'DESCUBRI' nav links. Col 3: 'PROPIETARIOS' nav links (first link: 'Publicá tu alojamiento' → `/suscriptores/propietarios/`). Col 4: 'EMPRESA' nav links. All link text via `t()`. Footer nav links use `--footer-fg-muted` color, hover → `--footer-fg` with 150ms ease-out. Column headings are `<h3>` elements. Mobile: single column, all sections always visible (no accordion). Tests: render test verifying 4 column structure and all nav links; mobile snapshot test showing stacked layout.

(2) Copyright bar at bottom: full-width strip with copyright text including `new Date().getFullYear()` for dynamic year, and legal disclaimer. Both texts via `t('footer.*')`. Section header (SectionHeader.astro), filter chips slot (FilterChips island placeholder), 3-column accommodation grid (`grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-[--space-card-gap]`), footer CTA ('Ver todos los alojamientos' → `/{locale}/alojamientos/`). tasks.title: Implement AccommodationCard.astro with all visual states
tasks.description: Update `apps/web2/src/components/shared/AccommodationCard.astro`. Fields: blob-masked image (Astro `<Image>`, aspect-ratio 4/3, `loading='lazy'`), name (Geologica Bold 20px), type badge (color from `colors.ts`), location (city + province), price/night (Roboto Bold, `--brand-accent`), rating stars (`RatingStars.astro`) + review count, featured badge (conditional), amenity strip (up to 3 icons with `aria-label` per icon wrapper, hidden when empty). Handle: no-reviews → render `t('home.featuredAccommodations.noReviews')` text; no-amenities → hide strip; featured badge variant. Hover states via CSS: image zoom `scale(1.08)`, badge bg → `--brand-primary`, name color → `--brand-primary`. Link wraps to `/{locale}/alojamientos/{slug}/`. tasks.title: Create article-card-utils.ts with shared article card logic

Content: category badge, title (Geologica Bold 24px, max 2 lines `line-clamp-2`), excerpt (Roboto 14px, max 2 lines, `line-clamp-2` → `line-clamp-3` on hover via CSS), tags (up to 3 via `truncateTags()` + '+N' badge), author avatar + name, `<time>` date, reading time, related entity link (if exists, shown below excerpt), promoted badge (if `isPromoted()`). Hover states: image zoom `scale(1.06)`, first tag bg → `--brand-primary`, title → `--brand-primary`, excerpt reveals 3rd line, avatar gets 2px ring. Card spans 2 grid columns in bento layout. tasks.title: Create VerticalArticleCard.astro (vertical-tall variant)
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/shared/VerticalArticleCard.astro`. Vertical layout: image top (aspect-ratio 4/3, Astro `<Image>`), content below (tall). Content: category badge, title (Geologica Bold 20px, `line-clamp-2`), tags (up to 3 + '+N' badge), `<time>` date, reading time, related entity link (shown below tags as `<a>`), promoted badge. No excerpt. Spans 2 grid rows in bento layout. Hover states: image zoom `scale(1.06)`, first tag bg → `--brand-primary`, title → `--brand-primary`, related entity link underline, date/reading-time opacity → 0.7. No image fallback → gradient background using `--brand-secondary`. Tests: snapshot with and without related entity; snapshot no image fallback.

subtasks.title: Build vertical layout with Image top
Add all article fields using utils

tasks.title: Create CompactArticleCard.astro (text-only variant)
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/shared/CompactArticleCard.astro`. Text-only layout (no image). Content: category badge, title (Geologica Bold 20px, `line-clamp-2`), tags (up to 3 + '+N' badge), `<time>` date. No excerpt, no related entity, no author. Hover states: card background tints to `--brand-secondary` (subtle via `color-mix`), title → `--brand-primary`, first tag bg → `--brand-primary`, 'Read more' arrow shifts 4px right via `translateX`. Decorative separator line changes to `--brand-accent`. Tests: snapshot with >3 tags showing '+N' badge; snapshot hover styles applied.

subtasks.title: Add hover CSS with background tint and arrow shift

tasks.title: Implement LatestArticlesSection.astro bento grid and data fetching
tasks.description: Implement `apps/web2/src/components/sections/LatestArticlesSection.astro`. Section header. Desktop bento grid: CSS Grid 2-column, named areas (card1 spans col 1-2 row 1; card2 spans col 1 row 2-3; card3 col 2 row 2; card4 col 2 row 3). Mobile: single column, all cards standard layout. Data: call `postsApi.list({ sortBy: 'publishedAt', sortOrder: 'desc', pageSize: 4 })`; fallback to `homepage-posts.ts` on error. Transform with `toPostCardProps()`. Empty state: `t('home.latestPosts.emptyState')`. Render: slot[0] → `FeaturedArticleCard`, slot[1] → `VerticalArticleCard`, slot[2-3] → `CompactArticleCard`. Footer CTA → `/{locale}/blog/`. Tests: render test for bento grid areas; mobile single-column test.

subtasks.title: Define CSS Grid named areas for desktop bento
Render correct card variant per slot

tasks.title: Implement PartnersSection.astro with Embla autoplay carousel
tasks.description: Implement `apps/web2/src/components/sections/PartnersSection.astro`. Section header (`t('home.partners.title')`). Embla Carousel configured for continuous slow scroll (~30px/s). Use `embla-carousel-autoplay` plugin with `{ stopOnMouseEnter: true, stopOnInteraction: false }`. Each logo: `` containing ``. Default logo style: `opacity: 0.6; filter: grayscale(1)`. Hover: `opacity: 1; filter: grayscale(0); transition: 150ms ease-out`. Data from `homepage-partners.ts`. Tests: render test for logo links and alt text; verify grayscale CSS class present.

subtasks.title: Set up Embla carousel with autoplay plugin
Render partner logos with correct alt text
Add grayscale default + color hover CSS
Write render tests for logo links and alt

tasks.title: Implement FilterChips.client.tsx React island
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/islands/FilterChips.client.tsx` and `FilterChips.module.css`. Props: `{ items: AccommodationCardData[]; locale: string; types: string[] }`. State: `activeType: string | null`. Render a row of `<button>` chips — one 'All' chip + one per unique accommodation type. Active chip: `aria-pressed='true'`, filled `--brand-primary` background. Inactive: `--brand-secondary` background. On click: toggle active type, filter items, call `onFilterChange` callback (or manage filtered state internally and render filtered `AccommodationCard` components). Keyboard: Enter/Space activate. Focus ring: 2px solid `--brand-primary`. Hover inactive: `color-mix(in oklch, var(--brand-secondary), black 10%)`. Module CSS for all classes. Tests: toggle chip active state; 'All' chip resets filter; keyboard Enter triggers toggle; aria-pressed state sync.

subtasks.title: Create FilterChips.client.tsx with chip toggle state
Create FilterChips.module.css with all visual states

tasks.title: Implement HeroSearchBar.client.tsx — type select and destination select fields
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/islands/HeroSearchBar.client.tsx` (and `.module.css`). Build the horizontal pill search bar structure. Implement fields 1 and 2: Accommodation type `<select>` and Destination `<select>`. Both have floating label behavior (label transitions to placeholder behavior on focus via `:has(select:focus)` CSS). No visible border on inputs — clean style matching Figma. Each field separated by a subtle vertical divider. Module CSS for pill container, field groups, dividers, and label transitions. Tests: render test for select elements; verify label-focus behavior via DOM state.

subtasks.title: Create HeroSearchBar.client.tsx skeleton with pill container
Implement type select with floating label
Implement destination select with floating label
Create .module.css with pill and field styles

tasks.title: Implement HeroSearchBar.client.tsx — date range field and guest counter dropdown
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/islands/HeroSearchBar.client.tsx`, implement fields 3 and 4: (3) Date range — single range input visually displayed as two date fields (check-in / check-out). Use native `<input type='date'>` pair or a simple controlled state approach. (4) Guest counter — on click, reveal `popover='auto'` dropdown with two rows: Adults (min 1, default 1) and Children (min 0, default 0). Each row has decrement/increment `<button>` + count display. Min/max validation on buttons. Tests: guest counter increment/decrement; min constraint (adults ≥ 1, children ≥ 0); popover opens on click.

subtasks.title: Implement popover dropdown for guest counter
Add min validation on decrement buttons

tasks.title: Implement HeroSearchBar.client.tsx — search button and mobile dialog drawer
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/islands/HeroSearchBar.client.tsx`, implement: (5) Search button — `<a>` link to `/{locale}/alojamientos/` styled as primary gradient pill button with search icon. Mobile dialog drawer: on mobile (<768px), the full search bar is replaced by a single 'Buscar alojamiento' trigger button. On click, call `dialogRef.current.showModal()` to open a `<dialog>` covering bottom 70% of viewport. Dialog contains full search form stacked vertically. Close via: swipe-down gesture, close button, or ESC (native dialog behavior). Closing animation: 200ms ease-in slide down. Tests: dialog opens on mobile trigger click; ESC closes dialog; search button renders as `<a>` tag with correct href.

subtasks.title: Add search button as <a> link to /alojamientos/
Add close button and slide-down animation

tasks.title: Implement DestinationsSection.astro layout and SVG map
tasks.description: Implement `apps/web2/src/components/sections/DestinationsSection.astro`. Two-column desktop layout: map 60% left, carousel 40% right. Mobile: map collapses, carousel full width. Map: single `<svg viewBox='...'>` element with Entre Rios province outline path. Each destination pin is a `<button aria-label='{destinationName}'>` positioned via `x` and `y` attributes (percentage-based within viewBox coordinates). Topographic pattern SVG overlay at 3-5% opacity on section background. Data: call `destinationsApi.list({ isFeatured: true, pageSize: 10 })`; fallback to `homepage-destinations.ts`. Pass destinations to `DestinationsCarousel` island. Tests: verify `<button>` pins with aria-labels; verify SVG has viewBox; mobile layout test.

subtasks.title: Build two-column layout with collapse on mobile
Create SVG map with viewBox and province outline
Add destination pins as <button> elements with aria-labels
Write tests for pin buttons and aria-labels

tasks.title: Implement DestinationsCarousel.client.tsx Embla carousel base
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/islands/DestinationsCarousel.client.tsx` and `.module.css`. Props: `{ destinations: DestinationCardData[]; locale: string }`. Set up Embla Carousel (no autoplay). 3 cards visible simultaneously: previous (blurred), active (full focus), next (blurred). Edge cards: `filter: blur(2px)` and `mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0%, black 15%, black 85%, transparent 100%)`. Navigation arrows with `aria-label` from i18n. Carousel region: `<section aria-label={t('home.featuredDestinations.ariaLabel')}>`; visible slide window: `aria-live='polite'`. If < 3 destinations: show all without blur. If 1: hide arrows. Tests: renders correct number of cards; blur applied to non-active cards; arrows hidden when single card.

subtasks.title: Set up Embla with 3-card visible config
Apply blur + mask to adjacent cards
Add aria-live region on slide window
Write tests for card count, blur, arrow visibility

tasks.title: Implement DestinationsCarousel.client.tsx map-pin bidirectional sync
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/islands/DestinationsCarousel.client.tsx`, implement bidirectional synchronization between map pins and carousel: (1) Clicking a map pin calls `emblaApi.scrollTo(destinationIndex)` and marks that card as active. (2) When carousel scrolls (via arrows, swipe), identify the active card index and emit event or call parent callback to highlight the corresponding pin. Active pin state: larger size (scale 1.3), different color (`--brand-primary`), pulse CSS animation. Communication between Astro parent and React island via custom events or callback props. Tests: pin click triggers correct carousel scroll; carousel scroll updates active pin; active pin has distinct visual state.

subtasks.title: Add active pin CSS (scale, color, pulse)

tasks.title: Implement TestimonialsSection.astro layout and TestimonialCard.astro
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/sections/TestimonialsSection.astro`. Two-region layout: left sidebar 30% (section title + subtitle + arrows + pagination dots), right area 70% (`TestimonialsCarousel` island). Create `apps/web2/src/components/shared/TestimonialCard.astro`. Fields: reviewer avatar (circular 48px; initials fallback — first letter of first+last name, uppercase, on `--brand-secondary` bg with `--brand-primary` text when no image), reviewer name (Roboto SemiBold 16px, truncate 1 line), rating stars (`RatingStars.astro`) with `aria-label='N.N de 5 estrellas'` on container + individual stars `aria-hidden`, review excerpt (`line-clamp-3`), entity link (`/{locale}/alojamientos/{slug}/` or `/destinos/{slug}/`). Fixed card height for consistency. Data from `homepage-reviews.ts` (max 10). Tests: snapshot with avatar; snapshot with initials fallback; verify rating aria-label.

subtasks.title: Add rating star aria-labels and aria-hidden
Write snapshot tests for both avatar variants

tasks.title: Implement TestimonialsCarousel.client.tsx with autoplay and pagination dots
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/islands/TestimonialsCarousel.client.tsx` and `.module.css`. Props: `{ testimonials: ReviewCardData[]; locale: string }`. Embla Carousel: 3 cards visible simultaneously. Autoplay plugin: `{ delay: 5000, stopOnInteraction: false, stopOnMouseEnter: true }`. After user interaction (arrow/dot click, swipe), resume autoplay after 8s inactivity via `plugin.reset()` after `setTimeout(8000)`. Pagination dots below carousel: active dot filled `--brand-primary`, inactive outlined; clickable calls `emblaApi.scrollTo(index)`. Dots hover: scale 1.15x. Swipe support via Embla touch. Max 10 testimonials. Render `TestimonialCard.astro` for static content. Tests: autoplay start/pause on hover; resume after 8s; pagination dot sync with active slide.

subtasks.title: Set up Embla with 3-card visible config and autoplay
Implement pause on hover, resume after 8s inactivity
Test autoplay pause/resume and dot sync

tasks.title: Implement AnimatedCounter.client.tsx with IntersectionObserver
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/islands/AnimatedCounter.client.tsx` and `.module.css`. Props: `{ target: number; suffix?: string; duration?: number; locale: string }`. Uses `IntersectionObserver` to trigger count-up animation when the component enters the viewport. Animation: `requestAnimationFrame` loop from 0 to `target` over `duration` ms (default 1500) with `cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94)` easing. After count reaches `target`, append `suffix` (e.g., '+'). `prefers-reduced-motion`: check via `matchMedia` — if reduced, show final value immediately without animation. Tests: counts from 0 to target; '+' suffix appears after count; reduced-motion shows final value immediately; IntersectionObserver fires animation.

subtasks.title: Implement rAF count-up with ease-out easing
Add suffix display after count completes

tasks.title: Wire AnimatedCounter into StatsSection.astro
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/sections/StatsSection.astro`, replace the static numeric value slots with `<AnimatedCounter client:visible target={stat.value} suffix={stat.suffix} locale={locale} />`. Ensure `locale` prop is passed. Each stat card passes its `target` from `homepage-config.ts`. Verify the island renders correctly within the 5-column grid. Tests: render test verifying AnimatedCounter island is mounted per stat card; verify locale prop is passed.

subtasks.title: Replace static values with AnimatedCounter islands
Write render tests for island mounting

tasks.title: Implement NewsletterForm.client.tsx with email validation
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/islands/NewsletterForm.client.tsx` and `.module.css`. Props: `{ locale: string }`. Render: email/WhatsApp `<input type='email' placeholder={t('footer.newsletter.placeholder')}>` + submit `<button>`. Validation: on submit, check email format via HTML5 `type='email'` + regex pattern. If invalid: show error message below input (`t('footer.newsletter.errorMessage')`), focus input. If valid: prevent default submit (no API call), disable button (add spinner icon), do nothing further. Add `// TODO: wire to newsletter API endpoint when available` comment in submit handler. Focus ring: `--brand-primary` 2px. Tests: invalid email shows error message; empty submit focuses input with error; valid email disables button without API call.

subtasks.title: Build form markup with input and submit button
Show inline error message on invalid
Disable button on valid submit (no API call)
Test invalid, empty, and valid submission paths

tasks.title: Implement MobileMenu.client.tsx full-screen overlay
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/islands/MobileMenu.client.tsx` and `.module.css`. Props: `{ locale: string; navLinks: NavLink[] }`. Controlled by `isOpen` state managed externally via callback or internal toggle. On open: render full-screen overlay sliding in from right (`transform: translateX(0)` from `translateX(100%)`), add `overflow: hidden` to `document.body` (scroll lock). On close: reverse slide, remove body overflow. Use native `<dialog>` with `showModal()` for automatic inert background + ESC handling. Nav links render as `<a>` list. Close button triggers `dialog.close()`. Focus trap: native `<dialog>` handles it. Tests: dialog opens on trigger; ESC closes dialog; body scroll is locked while open; all nav links are rendered.

subtasks.title: Implement slide-in animation via CSS transform
Test open, ESC close, scroll lock, and link rendering

tasks.title: Wire MobileMenu island into Header.astro

Pass locale from `Astro.locals.locale`. Build `navLinks` array from the same links used in the desktop nav. The hamburger icon in the header triggers the island's open state. Verify the island mounts with `client:idle` (above-fold, needed soon). Tests: render test verifying MobileMenu island is present in Header; verify locale prop passed.

subtasks.title: Pass navLinks and locale props to MobileMenu island
Write render test for island mounting

tasks.title: Wire HeroSearchBar island into HeroSection.astro
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/components/sections/HeroSection.astro`, replace the static search bar placeholder with `<HeroSearchBar client:idle locale={locale} accommodationTypes={types} destinations={destinations} />`. Pass accommodation types and destination options from `homepage-config.ts` or static data. Set `client:idle` directive (above-fold island). Verify the island renders within the hero left column. Tests: render test verifying HeroSearchBar island mounts; verify props are passed correctly.

tasks.title: Wire FilterChips and DestinationsCarousel islands into their sections
tasks.description: Wire remaining islands into Astro sections: (1) In `FeaturedAccommodationsSection.astro`, add `<FilterChips client:visible items={accommodations} locale={locale} />` and remove direct AccommodationCard rendering (FilterChips renders filtered grid). (2) In `DestinationsSection.astro`, add `<DestinationsCarousel client:visible destinations={destinations} locale={locale} />` in the right column. Verify `client:visible` directives (below-fold). Pass correct props. Tests: render tests verifying each island mounts with correct props.

tasks.title: Implement ScrollToTop.astro floating button with progress ring
tasks.description: Create `apps/web2/src/components/shared/ScrollToTop.astro`. Floating `<button>` fixed to bottom-right corner. Desktop: 48px, mobile: 40px. SVG progress ring: `<circle>` radius 18px, `stroke-dasharray` + `stroke-dashoffset` driven by scroll percentage. Ring color `--brand-primary`. Hidden when scroll < 300px (opacity 0, pointer-events none). Inline `<script>`: `scroll` event listener with `requestAnimationFrame` updates `stroke-dashoffset` and button opacity. On click: `window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' })`. Hover: bg → `--brand-primary`, icon → `--button-label-on-dark`. Focus ring: 2px solid `--brand-primary`. `aria-label={t('common.scrollToTop')}`. Check `prefers-reduced-motion` and skip smooth scroll if active. Tests: verify button has aria-label; verify SVG circle element present.

subtasks.title: Build circular button with SVG progress ring
Add scroll event listener with rAF for ring update
Add show/hide logic at scroll 300px threshold
Add smooth scroll to top on click
Write tests for aria-label and SVG presence

tasks.title: Add global focus ring and CSS layer organization to global.css
tasks.description: In `apps/web2/src/styles/global.css`, add: (1) Universal focus ring rule: `a:focus-visible, button:focus-visible, input:focus-visible, select:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brand-primary); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: var(--radius-md); }` and suppress browser default `outline: none` on `:focus` only. (2) Organize CSS into `@layer` blocks: `@layer base, tokens, components, sections, utilities`. Move existing rules into appropriate layers. (3) Add `html { scroll-behavior: smooth }`. Tests: verify focus ring rule present in CSS; verify @layer order in file.

tasks.title: Responsive QA at xs and sm breakpoints (320px, 640px)

Check: hero stacks vertically with text on top and blob below; search bar shows single trigger button; all grids are 1-column; stats show 2x2+1; partners show horizontal scroll; footer stacks vertically; no horizontal scrollbar at 280px. Document any visual regressions found. Fix layout issues in the relevant component files. Tests: automated snapshot tests at 320px and 640px for each section; verify no overflow-x on body at 280px.

subtasks.title: Test partners horizontal scroll at mobile
Fix any layout overflow or breakage found

tasks.title: Responsive QA at md and lg breakpoints (768px, 1024px)
tasks.description: Visual QA pass at 768px and 1024px viewports. Check: hero reduced title (64px) at md; search bar 2x2 grid at md; events grid 2-column at md; destinations map visible at reduced size at md; footer 2x2 nav grid at md; hero full 2-column at lg; accommodations 3-column grid at lg; destinations 2-column layout at lg; stats 5-column at lg. Fix any layout issues found. Tests: automated snapshot tests at 768px and 1024px for each affected section.

subtasks.title: Test hero and search bar at 768px

tasks.title: Responsive QA at xl and 2xl breakpoints (1440px, 2560px)
tasks.description: Visual QA pass at 1440px and 2560px viewports. At 1440px: verify pixel-accurate layout against Figma reference. At 2560px: verify content is constrained to max-width 1440px centered, section backgrounds extend to full viewport width. Check all sections for any overflow or misalignment. Tests: automated snapshot at 1440px; verify `max-width: 1440px; margin: 0 auto` on content container CSS.

Fix any overflow at wide viewports

tasks.title: Accessibility audit — keyboard navigation and focus rings
tasks.description: Audit keyboard navigation across all interactive elements on the page. Verify: Tab order is logical top-to-bottom, left-to-right. All interactive elements (links, buttons, inputs, chips, carousel arrows, pagination dots, pins) receive visible focus ring (2px solid `--brand-primary`, 2px offset). Skip navigation link appears as first focusable element and becomes visible on focus. Map pins are `<button>` elements reachable via Tab. No keyboard traps except within `<dialog>` (native behavior). Fix any missing focus rings or Tab order issues. Tests: automated axe-core scan for keyboard-related violations; manual Tab sequence verification.

subtasks.title: Run axe-core scan for keyboard violations
Verify Tab order across all sections
Verify focus ring on all interactive elements
Verify skip navigation link visibility on focus

tasks.title: Accessibility audit — screen reader and ARIA
tasks.description: Audit screen reader announcements and ARIA attributes. Verify: rating stars containers have `aria-label='N.N de 5 estrellas'` (or locale equivalent) and individual stars have `aria-hidden='true'`. Amenity icon wrappers have `aria-label` matching the amenity name. Partner logos have `alt='Logo de {name}'`. Decorative images have `alt=''` and optionally `role='presentation'`. Carousel region has `aria-label` and `aria-live='polite'`. Map pins are `<button>` with `aria-label`. Filter chips have `aria-pressed`. ScrollToTop button has `aria-label`. Heading hierarchy is correct (h1 in hero, h2 for sections, h3 for card titles). Tests: axe-core scan for ARIA violations; heading structure test.

subtasks.title: Audit rating star ARIA across all cards
Audit icon aria-labels (amenity, map pin, partner)

tasks.title: Accessibility audit — contrast ratios
tasks.description: Check WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text) across all sections. Priority areas: stats section (values on gradient background), muted text (`--core-muted-foreground` on white `--core-card`), footer text (`--footer-fg-muted` on `--footer-bg`), badge text on colored backgrounds. Use browser DevTools or a contrast checker tool. If any fail: add semi-opaque scrim or `text-shadow` to the affected element. Record contrast ratios for the 5 most critical text/background pairs. Tests: automated color-contrast check via axe-core; manual check for stats section gradient.

subtasks.title: Check stats section text on gradient
Fix any failing contrast with scrim or text-shadow

tasks.title: Lighthouse performance audit and CLS verification
tasks.description: Run Lighthouse audit on the homepage in mobile 3G simulation mode. Target: Performance >= 90, Accessibility >= 95. Verify CLS < 0.1 on desktop and mobile. Check: all images have explicit `width` and `height`; hero LCP image has `fetchpriority='high'`; below-fold images have `loading='lazy'` and `decoding='async'`; no layout shifts from font loading (use `font-display: swap`). If Performance < 90: identify largest bottlenecks (LCP, FID, CLS) and apply fixes (image optimization, unused CSS deferral, island lazy loading). Tests: document Lighthouse scores in a QA report; CLS measurement via PerformanceObserver.

subtasks.title: Measure CLS on desktop and mobile
Verify all images have width/height/loading attrs
Document final scores in QA report

tasks.title: Cross-browser testing on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge
tasks.description: Test the homepage in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Priority checks: (1) Blob SVG mask (`clip-path` / `mask-image`) renders correctly in all browsers. (2) OKLCH colors render correctly (Firefox 133+ required for OKLCH; verify no fallback needed for supported browser matrix). (3) `color-mix()` hover states work. (4) `:has()` selector applied correctly. (5) `<dialog>` overlay functions in all browsers. (6) CSS `@layer` respected. (7) Embla carousel touch/swipe works in Safari iOS. Document any browser-specific issues and fix. Tests: manual test checklist per browser; document findings.

subtasks.title: Test in Chrome — full page visual check
Test in Firefox — OKLCH color check
Test in Safari — blob mask and touch events
